title: Iranian-Americans protest against Iran team at World Cup
summary_full: The BBC’s Shaimaa Khalil was outside the Iran v New Zealand opening round match as protesters called for an end to Tehran’s clerical regime.
summary_public: The BBC’s Shaimaa Khalil was outside the Iran v New Zealand opening round match as protesters called for an end to Tehran’s clerical regime.

IR.label: positive
IR.evidence: protesters called for an end to Tehran’s clerical regime.
